description: The `retries` context-retry policy end-to-end. `retries` (config + context, default 1) re-runs a whole context on a fresh session when its session dies mid-run, detected by an active liveness probe. A fixture can't deterministically kill a live session, so the retry control flow (retry-on-dead-session, no-retry-on-live-FAIL, budget exhaustion, 0-disables, context-field restore) is asserted in test/browser-fallback.test.js. This spec proves the schema surface is accepted end-to-end and the policy is a NO-OP on a healthy, passing run: a context that explicitly sets `retries` still PASSES normally when nothing dies.

tests.description: A context with an explicit retries override runs green unchanged when its session stays healthy — the retry never fires on a passing run.
